report.summary: Audited 2 new learn guides (DeFi Insurance, DVT) for UX consistency, verified OG images already created, and implemented 6 cross-page UX refinements including responsive typography, color normalization, and upgraded related articles.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: DVT page H1: Added gradient text (linear-gradient indigo→teal) matching DeFi Insurance page pattern for visual consistency
Normalized H2 headings across both pages to use clamp(22px, 4vw, 28px) for responsive sizing (was 26px on insurance, 32px on DVT)
Fixed 12+ hardcoded #c9d1d9 color values in DeFi Insurance page to use S.text2 theme variable for maintainability
DVT comparison table: Made scroll hint visible (was hidden with display:none) — now shows '↔ Scroll horizontally' on all viewports
DeFi Insurance related articles: Upgraded from minimal arrow-links to rich cards with descriptions matching DVT page pattern
DeFi Insurance FAQ section: Normalized from card-style to divider-style with numbered questions matching DVT page for cross-page consistency

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: defi-insurance-protocols-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — already existed from build cycle with shield icons, stat cards (DeFi TVL $1T+, Insured <2%, Claims $18M+), green accent gradient

OG image: distributed-validator-technology-dvt-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — already existed from build cycle with distributed node network visualization, stat cards (SSV 4M+ ETH, Obol $2B, 1000+ operators), purple/blue accent gradient

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Resolved)
items: Inconsistent H1 styling: DVT page lacked gradient text present on insurance page — FIXED
Inconsistent H2 sizing: 26px vs 32px across pages — FIXED with responsive clamp()
Hardcoded colors in insurance page: #c9d1d9 used instead of theme variable — FIXED (12+ instances)
Hidden scroll hint on DVT table comparison: display:none was non-functional — FIXED to visible
Related articles UX gap: Insurance page had minimal arrow-links vs DVT's descriptive cards — FIXED
FAQ section formatting mismatch: Card-style vs divider-style across pages — FIXED to consistent divider pattern

sections.title: Build Verification
items: TypeScript check passed — only pre-existing @types/web conflicts in node_modules (expected, ignoreBuildErrors: true)
Both pages structurally intact: Breadcrumb, StructuredData, BackToTop, FAQ schema, related articles all present
Layout files with Metadata export verified unchanged and correct
